_comment: Configuration for job_search_daily.py — edit these values to tune job search behaviour

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Built and maintained RESTful APIs serving 100,000+ monthly requests
Improved test coverage from 40% to 90% using Selenium and Postman
Led migration to cloud infrastructure reducing operational costs by 30%

candidate.name: Your Name
candidate.summary: Full-Stack Software Developer with X years of experience building scalable, secure platforms. Specialised in RESTful API development, test automation, and cloud infrastructure.
candidate.title: Full-Stack Software Developer

cleanup._comment: Folder retention policy. Cleanup only triggers once trigger_after_days folders exist, then keeps the newest keep_days and deletes the rest.

scoring._comment_remote: Remote jobs get +0.5 score bonus — preferred but not required

sources._comment: All sources are free and require no API keys

himalayas._comment: Global remote jobs JSON API. Supports keyword search.

career_sites._comment: Company career page URLs. Supports Ashby, Greenhouse, and Lever automatically.

indeed._comment: Indeed RSS — feed URLs are built from these queries + canada_location automatically.

jobbank._comment: Government of Canada job board. Canadian roles. Atom RSS feed.

jobicy._comment: Dev jobs RSS — includes remote, hybrid, and onsite roles.

realworkfromanywhere._comment: Category-specific remote RSS feeds. Full-stack + backend.

remoteok._comment: Broad global remote job board. Single RSS feed.

remotive._comment: Global remote jobs JSON API. software-dev category. Max 4 req/day.
